text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even before the concert begins,<n>cheers from the
audience reach the<n>girls waiting in the wings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This prompts Agnes Tachyon to<n>declare that
wishes have the potential<n>to be explosive
catalysts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the Grand Concert draws closer,<n>the wishes of
all those involved grow<n>more resolute. It's time for
our fourth<n>concert!
